tasks.subject: Task 0: Set up upstream reference clone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Have a byte-exact copy of `hollow/dotfiles@1c3018c` on disk so vendored content can be derived verbatim and diffed.

**Files:**
- Create: `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` (ephemeral working clone, not part of the repo)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` exists and `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` prints `1c3018c`.

**Verify:** `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` -> `1c3018c`

**Steps:**
1. `rm -rf /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git clone -q https://github.com/hollow/dotfiles /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles checkout -q 1c3018c`
2. Confirm HEAD is `1c3018c`. No commit (scratch clone).

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/tmp/hollow-dotfiles checked out at 1c3018c"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add the mise section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install mise via Homebrew, add upstream's mise `.zshrc` block, and vendor `mise/config.toml` with an empty `[tools]` table.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile` (add `brew "mise"` between `brew "make"` and `brew "ncdu"`)
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc` (insert mise block immediately after the ncdu block's `link ncduignore .ncduignore`, before `# rsync`)
- Create: `mise/config.toml` (upstream's, with `[tools]` entries removed -> header only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `brew "mise"` alphabetically between `make` and `ncdu`.
- [ ] `zsh/.zshrc` contains the 10-line mise block exactly as upstream, between the ncdu block and the rsync block.
- [ ] `mise/config.toml` equals upstream's with exactly the six `[tools]` entry lines removed (only `[tools]` remains).
- [ ] Every added `.zshrc` line is byte-identical to upstream.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(grep -A9 '^# mise: dev tools' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A9 '^# mise: dev tools' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc) && diff <(grep -v ' = ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/mise/config.toml) mise/config.toml`

**Steps:**
1. `mkdir -p mise && grep -v ' = ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/mise/config.toml > mise/config.toml` (yields exactly `[tools]`).
2. Brewfile: insert `brew "mise"` between `brew "make"` and `brew "ncdu"`.
3. zsh/.zshrc: after `link ncduignore .ncduignore` (and its blank line) insert the 10-line mise block (MISE_SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE export, :mise-load running `mise activate zsh`, `zi auto has"mise" for jdx/mise`).
4. Verify parse + block diff + config diff.
5. Commit `Brewfile zsh/.zshrc mise/config.toml` -> "Ring 6: add mise (brew, .zshrc block, empty-tools config)".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc", "mise/config.toml"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(grep -A9 '^# mise: dev tools' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A9 '^# mise: dev tools' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc) && diff <(grep -v ' = ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/mise/config.toml) mise/config.toml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brewfile has mise between make and ncdu", "mise .zshrc block byte-identical to upstream, between ncdu and rsync", "mise/config.toml = upstream minus [tools] entries (header only)", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add the age + sops sections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install `age` and `sops` via Homebrew and add upstream's sops `.zshrc` block (the `SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE` export), and vendor `sops/.gitignore` byte-identical. `age` is brew-only.

**Files:**
- Create: `sops/.gitignore` (byte-identical copy from upstream)
- Modify: `Brewfile` (add `brew "age"` as the first brew, before `brew "atool"`; add `brew "sops"` between `brew "rsync"` and `brew "sponge"`)
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc` (insert sops block immediately after the rsync block's `zi auto wait for OMZP::rsync`, before `# ssh: secure shell`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `Brewfile` contains `brew "age"` as the first `brew` line (before `atool`) and `brew "sops"` between `rsync` and `sponge`.
- [ ] `zsh/.zshrc` contains the 3-line sops block exactly as upstream, between the rsync block and the ssh block.
- [ ] Every added `.zshrc` line is byte-identical to upstream.
- [ ] `sops/.gitignore` is byte-identical to upstream (`age/keys.txt`).
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(grep -A2 '^# sops: editor of encrypted' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A2 '^# sops: editor of encrypted' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc) && diff sops/.gitignore /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/sops/.gitignore`

**Steps:**
1. `mkdir -p sops && cp /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/sops/.gitignore sops/.gitignore`. Brewfile: add `brew "age"` as the very first brew line (before `atool`); insert `brew "sops"` between `brew "rsync"` and `brew "sponge"`.
2. zsh/.zshrc: after `zi auto wait for OMZP::rsync` (and its blank line) insert the 3-line sops block (SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE export). (mise block is earlier, between ncdu and rsync.)
3. Verify parse + block diff + gitignore diff + age/sops in upstream Brewfile.
4. Commit `Brewfile zsh/.zshrc sops/.gitignore` -> "Ring 6: add age + sops (brews + sops .zshrc block)".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sops/.gitignore", "Brewfile", "zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(grep -A2 '^# sops: editor of encrypted' zsh/.zshrc) <(grep -A2 '^# sops: editor of encrypted' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc) && diff sops/.gitignore /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/sops/.gitignore", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brewfile has age first (before atool) and sops between rsync and sponge", "sops .zshrc block byte-identical to upstream, between rsync and ssh", "sops/.gitignore byte-identical to upstream", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Faithfulness + Brewfile audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole ring is a clean subset - no Brewfile deviations, valid Brewfile, valid zsh, and the only file-level deviation is the one intended deletion (emptied `mise/config.toml` `[tools]`); `sops/.gitignore` is vendored byte-identical.

**Files:**
- None (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all` parses and lists `age`, `mise`, `sops`.
- [ ] `comm -23` of this repo's `brew`/`cask` lines against upstream's is empty.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` exits 0.
- [ ] `mise/config.toml` equals upstream's minus the `[tools]` entries; `sops/.gitignore` is byte-identical to upstream.

**Verify:** the audit bash block -> ends with `AUDIT CLEAN`

**Steps:**
1. Run the audit block (brew bundle list checks for age/mise/sops; comm -23 deviation check; zsh -n; mise/config.toml diff; sops/.gitignore diff) -> `AUDIT CLEAN`.
2. (Optional) Manual smoke test after `brew bundle install`. No commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "set -e; for f in age mise sops; do brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all | grep -qx \"$f\"; done; dev=$(comm -23 <(grep -E '^(brew|cask) ' Brewfile | sort -u) <(grep -E '^(brew|cask) ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/Brewfile | sort -u)); [ -z \"$dev\" ]; zsh -n zsh/.zshrc; diff <(grep -v ' = ' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/mise/config.toml) mise/config.toml; diff sops/.gitignore /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/sops/.gitignore; echo AUDIT CLEAN", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Brewfile parses and lists age, mise, sops", "no brew/cask deviations vs upstream", "zsh -n passes", "mise/config.toml = upstream minus tools; sops/.gitignore byte-identical"]}
```
